## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? 2-3 sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / refactor

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? -->

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test -- --run` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Manually tested in browser (if UI change)

## Apps Script changes

- [ ] No Apps Script files changed
- [ ] `clasp push` run and deployed web app verified

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title is clear and describes the change
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` files committed
- [ ] `npm audit` shows no new vulnerabilities
